name: Walter Melrose
abstract: Walter Melrose (October 26, 1889 – May 30, 1973) was an American music publisher and lyricist in the 1920s and 1930s.

about_quotes.speaker: Al Wynn
about_quotes.evidence: Now the other records that we made was for Melrose... Mr. Melrose, his brother was over there... Walter Melrose. Yes, Walter was the oldest one... Well, I think we did business with the heavy something... Mr. Melrose himself was thin... So we went down to record this. So the man, the, he hit with us

about_quotes.speaker: Roy Carew
about_quotes.evidence: Walter Melrose. No, I think it was Walter, yeah, Walter Melrose. The publisher. He never wrote anything.
